top_findings.title: TypeScript build fails: Cannot find module '../lib/tsc.js'
top_findings.evidence: npm run build fails with: Error: Cannot find module '../lib/tsc.js' at node_modules/.bin/tsc:2:1
top_findings.suggestion: Check typescript package installation; may require npm install or clearing node_modules and reinstalling

top_findings.title: Tests cannot be verified due to build failure
top_findings.evidence: npm test would fail because npm run build fails first
top_findings.suggestion: Fix the TypeScript build issue before attempting to verify test results
